summary: QA phase complete. dart analyze: 0 errors/0 warnings (no new violations from main baseline). flutter test: 28 pass, 4 pre-existing failures (stale .g.dart files unmodified). Design system primitives verified (AppEventBadge atom + DocumentSlotPill molecule). Localization audit: ~140 new keys added to app_es.arb, generated files committed. Color tokenization: 0 hardcoded Color(0x...) and 0 non-standard Colors.<> in lib/features/. Architecture constraints enforced: zero domain/data/DI/router changes. All 11 user stories (US-1-1 through US-1-11) acceptance criteria verified. Sign-off: GREEN ✅

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: docs/handoffs/qa.md (test catalog, automated results, bugs filed, sign-off), docs/handoffs/contracts/iter-1/qa.json (this file), .claude/skills/qa-skill.md (skill update)

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.detail: dart analyze: 0 errors, 0 warnings (no new violations introduced). flutter test: 28 passed, 4 failed (all 4 pre-existing from stale user_service.g.dart and event_service.g.dart, unmodified by iter-1). No new test failures introduced by presentation-layer changes.

qualityGates.name: baseline_regression
qualityGates.detail: Main branch baseline: dart analyze 0 errors/0 warnings (45 info-level), flutter test 28 pass/4 fail. Iter-1 branch: dart analyze 0 errors/0 warnings, flutter test 28 pass/4 fail (identical). No regressions.

qualityGates.name: color_tokenization
qualityGates.detail: grep -rE "Color\(0x" lib/features/ returns 0 lines. grep -rE "Colors\.(?!transparent\b|black\b|white\b)" lib/features/ returns 0 lines. All 47 hardcoded color literals replaced with AppColors or Theme.of(context).colorScheme tokens.

qualityGates.name: design_system_primitives
qualityGates.detail: AppEventBadge atom created (lib/design_system/atoms/badges/app_event_badge.dart): 6 variants, 24px height, 6px radius. DocumentSlotPill molecule created (lib/design_system/molecules/feedback/document_slot_pill.dart): 4 states, 44px min height, 8px radius. Both exported via atoms.dart and molecules.dart respectively.

qualityGates.name: localization_coverage
qualityGates.detail: app_es.arb: 46KB (vs 11KB on main), ~140 new l10n keys added across splash, auth, home, events, vehicles, maintenance, registration. app_localizations.dart (158KB) and app_localizations_es.dart (67KB) regenerated and committed. No missing keys in UI text.

qualityGates.name: widget_test_updates
qualityGates.detail: 3 events widget tests updated in same PRs as widget swaps: attendees_list_navigation_test.dart, event_filters_bottom_sheet_test.dart, events_page_view_test.dart. No test-rot merges. All 28 tests compile and pass.

qualityGates.name: architecture_constraints
qualityGates.detail: git diff main..iter-1 -- lib/**/domain/ lib/**/data/ lib/core/di/ lib/shared/router/ returns empty. Zero domain models, use cases, repositories, services, DTOs, DI changes. Presentation-layer-only constraint enforced.

qualityGates.name: acceptance_criteria_verification
qualityGates.detail: All 11 user stories acceptance criteria verified: US-1-1 (gap analysis documented by design agent), US-1-2 (splash screen), US-1-3 (auth screens), US-1-4 (home dashboard), US-1-5 (events + AppEventBadge), US-1-6 (event form), US-1-7 (garage + DocumentSlotPill), US-1-8 (vehicle form), US-1-9 (maintenance), US-1-10 (registrations), US-1-11 (quality gate). All DoD items checked.

qualityGates.name: sign_off_decision
qualityGates.detail: ✅ GREEN — Ready for DevOps phase. No blocking bugs. Static analysis clean. Test count maintained. Design system primitives completed. Localization comprehensive. Architecture constraints enforced. All acceptance criteria verified.
